creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: jbeich

Log:
  Consistently prefer ${CONFIGURE_CMD} over ./${CONFIGURE_SCRIPT}

  This also fixes SET_LATE_CONFIGURE_ARGS with custom CONFIGURE_CMD.
